channel.title: Network on VPN Setup Tutorial
channel.description: Recent content in Network on VPN Setup Tutorial

item.title: Network Lab: How to Set Up a Network
item.description: How to Set Up a Network: A Practical Guide In this tutorial, we will cover the step-by-step process of setting up a network in a practical environment. Network Components Overview Nodes: Devices connected to the network. Patch Panel: Organizes and manages cables in the server rack. Cables: Pre-laid cables running from client nodes to the server room. Keystone Jack: Used for terminating cables. Rack: Structure holding the patch panel. Key Observations Cables converge in the server room and connect via the patch panel.
